turns.q: For a first-timer like me, what's the safest, easiest choice?
turns.replyTail:
Straight if you want an easy everyday fit. If you want something a little looser and more casual, Catherine Boyfriend is also a safe first choice.

When choosing, look for a waistband that sits comfortably without digging in or gapping, and denim with some stretch for all-day comfort.

If you want the simplest way to narrow it down, our fit quiz is here: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/pages/fit-quiz
You can also compare fits here: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/pages/denim-fit-guide

turns.q: Is there anything else a beginner needs to get started?
turns.replyTail:
:

Fit: straight or relaxed straight is usually the easiest place to start
Rise: mid-rise or high-rise changes where the waistband sits
Length: standard, petite, or tall depends on your inseam
Fabric feel: stretch denim is usually easier and more forgiving than rigid denim

A simple next step is to compare fits here: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/pages/denim-fit-guide
For a more personalized starting point, you can also use the fit quiz: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/pages/fit-quiz
